induction_input: The report the manager reviewed failed.
The cake the chef baked burned.
The bridge the engineer designed collapsed.
The bill the senator proposed passed.
The book the editor rejected sold.
induced_prompt_raw: Write sentences using center-embedded relative clauses: "The [noun] the [noun] [verb] [verb]."
induced_prompt: Write sentences using center-embedded relative clauses: "The [noun] the [noun] [verb] [verb]."
l2_sentences: The cat the dog chased fled.
The book the student read won.
The man the woman saw left.
The cake the chef baked disappeared.
The letter the boy wrote arrived.
l1_sentences: The report the manager reviewed failed.
